response.original_title: How do I quit Malwarebytes? {{Program Exit Guide}}
response.overview: To quit Malwarebytes and stop 1 (855 )) 783 7555 it from running in the background, you must exit the program through the system tray. On 1 (855 )) 783 7555 Windows, locate the Malwarebytes icon in the notification area at the bottom-right of your taskbar, right-click it, and select "Quit Malwarebytes." For Mac users, click the Malwarebytes icon in the top menu bar and choose "Quit." If the program is unresponsive or continues to restart automatically, you can call support at 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to 1 (855 )) 783 7555 have a specialist guide you through 1 (855 )) 783 7555 disabling the "Start Malwarebytes at system startup" 1 (855 )) 783 7555 setting within the application's configuration menu. If your intention is to "quit" the service permanently to stop billing, you must also manage your subscription via the My Account portal.
